title: halimium multiflorum
intro: Halimium multiflorum, also known as rockrose or Cistus ladanifer, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its astringent and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Halimium multiflorum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
